title: Crafting The Impossible
description: Adding uncraftable recipes into Minecraft and making them balanced
body:
## **Crafting the Impossible adds recipes for uncraftable items.**
**_For the best downloading experience click on the download button uptop rather than the versions tab_**

_If you're downloading the Datapack version then you want to place it into the datapack folder of your minecraft world_ 

**If you have any suggestions,feedback or bug reports please send a DM on discord to _4_Square_ or make a comment on the curseforge page**
# **Current Recipes**
To see images go to the Gallery tab

<details>
<summary>List of Current Recipes</summary>
  
- Totem Of Undying
- Trident
- Saddle 
- Ender Pearl 
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Bottle O' Enchanting
- Crying Obsidian 
- Name Tag
- Bell 
- Sponge
- Cobweb
- Lead
- Lodestone 
- Reinforced Deepslate
- Netherite Upgrade Template _(suggestion by user_qtkpyoxws9rsvn2z)_
- Nether Star _(suggestion by user_3rmaeslpbqd120aw)_
- Dragon Breath _(suggestion by Toran0246)_
- Prismarine Shard
- Heart of the Sea
- Chainmail Helmet
- Chainmail Chestplate
- Chainmail Leggings 
- Chainmail Boots
- Leather Horse Armor
- Iron Horse Armor
- Gold Horse Armor
- Blackstone
- String
- Gilded Blackstone
- Skeleton Skull
- Wither Skeleton Skull
- Zombie Head
- Piglin Head
- Gravel
- Suspicious Gravel
- Suspicious Sand
- Red Mushroom Block
- Brown Mushroom Block
- Mushroom Stem


</details>





_If you want to add this mod to any server or modpack, please ask 4_Square on discord_
